_about: Per-user defaults for corpus-vitae. Copy to data/<user>/preferences.json (gitignored) and edit. These set the DEFAULTS; any explicit per-run instruction from the user overrides them. Load at session start; create from this example if absent.

_field_docs.honesty_dial: 0-10 tailoring intensity (Stage 7); default 6. Framing only, never fabrication.
_field_docs.build_credit: true = include the neutral 'Drafted with corpus-vitae' footer on outputs.
_field_docs.show_dial: false = keep the honesty-dial number internal (resume.json meta), never printed.
_field_docs.ai_narrative: false = opt-in; when true, include the corpus-vitae 'I build with AI' project/cover element.
_field_docs.job_source: Stage 5 default source: linkedin-claude-fetch | chrome-single | greenhouse | lever | ashby | smartrecruiters | usajobs | paste.
_field_docs.output_formats: Stage 8 formats to generate: any of md, pdf, docx.
_field_docs.usajobs: Optional free API key + registered email for the usajobs source.
_field_docs.bls_key: Optional free BLS API key → batched v2 salary-benchmark calls in fetch_company_intel.py (keyless v1 used if blank).
